text: \nWhich scenario is most likely to violate the principles of data ethics?
answer: A social media site uses keywords from posts to determine what type of political ad to show users.
a: A realtor predicts the price of houses and matches the houses to a new customer's income.
b: A social media site uses keywords from posts to determine what type of political ad to show users.
c: An online retailer uses purchase history to determine what type of ad to send customers on an email list.
d: A company uses keywords from resumes to determine what candidates to interview for a new position.

text: Which of the following is not a common strategy for data anonymization of a dataset?
answer: Changing categorical features to numeric values.
a: Replacing features like name and address with an ID number.
c: Changing categorical features to numeric values.
d: Shifting numerical features by small amounts, such as income or age.

text: Which scenario is most likely to result in algorithm bias as a model is being found?
answer: A model that accepts or rejects applications to a science program. Males are more likely to apply than females.
a: A model predicts the best heart medication for patients based on other health factors like potassium level. People with more severe heart disease are more likely to have higher potassium levels.
b: A model uses credit score, income, and purchase history to determine the interest rate offered on a loan. People with higher incomes are more likely to have good credit scores.
c: A model that accepts or rejects applications to a science program. Males are more likely to apply than females.
d: A model that predicts the species of a penguin based features like flipper length. One particular species tends to have large flippers.

text: What, if any, impact does data science have on environmental issues?
answer: Since data science can be used for effective modeling, but storing data takes a lot of energy, data science can have both positive and negative effects on environmental issues.
a: Since data can be used to create models for things like climate change, data science is helpful for dealing with environmental issues.
b: Since big data is mostly used by companies to market products, data science has a negative impact on the environment.
c: Since data science can be used for effective modeling, but storing data takes a lot of energy, data science can have both positive and negative effects on environmental issues.
d: Data science does not really have anything to do with environmental issues.
